case_title: ABAIGAR, NICK DBA GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL VS. EVELYN GAVIOLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,209.70 FILED BY ABAIGAR, NICK DBA GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIOLA, EVELYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABAIGAR, NICK DBA GREAT PACIFIC TRAVEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAVIOLA, EVELYN $2,209.70 PRINCIPAL, $73.00 INTEREST, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,432.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GAVIOLA, EVELYN HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
